title: Midnight Hake Medley
description: A pescatarian-friendly midnight craving dish featuring hake in a tangy and crispy sauce, perfect for a savory dinner.
instructions: Mix ginger and garlic in a blender with 1/4 cup of water. Add salt to taste.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Sauté finely chopped onion until golden brown, then add green chili peppers and sauté for 2 more minutes.
Pour the blended ginger-garlic mixture into the hot pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring frequently.
Add salt to taste and mix well. Add hake fillets evenly spaced in the sauce.
Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until fish is fully cooked.
Serve with a side of naan bread and garnish with fresh cilantro.
